title: viburnum betulifolium var. flocculosum
intro: Viburnum betulifolium var. flocculosum, commonly known as a flowering shrub, is a plant species that belongs to the Adoxaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties and is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Viburnum betulifolium var. flocculosum include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which aid in soothing digestive issues and reducing fever. The bioactive constituents present in this plant include triterpenoids, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which have therapeutic actions such as antioxidant, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects.

side_effects: Viburnum betulifolium var. flocculosum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, due to its toxic compounds, particularly grayanotoxins.
